steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what function the underlined sentence serves in the passage. The sentence reports that cuttlefish adjusted their strikes to match 3D images, showing their vision works similarly to that of horses and toads. This is an outcome of the experiment, so the correct choice must describe a function related to presenting findings.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It explains how 3D vision in horses and toads differs from the type of 3D vision discussed in the text.: the sentence compares cuttlefish vision with that of other animals, but it does not explain how horses' and toads' 3D vision differs from cuttlefish 3D vision. ✗
  • Choice B — It offers a suggestion for future research on the aspect of 3D vision discussed in the text.: the sentence reports a past result, not a direction for further study. ✗
  • Choice C — It presents the results of the study of 3D vision discussed in the text.: the sentence states what cuttlefish did when shown the 3D images — a direct experimental outcome. ✓
  • Choice D — It explains why the animals discussed in the text were once thought to lack 3D vision.: the sentence does not address what researchers previously believed. ✗
That matches Choice C — It presents the results of the study of 3D vision discussed in the text..
